name: Scalloped Shade Table Lamp with Marble Base White - Threshold™
description:
Style your space with the Scalloped Shade Table Lamp with Marble Base from Threshold™. This white table lamp features a white scalloped shade that complements the gold-tone body and round marble base for a modern look. Designed with a one-way light setting, this table lamp has an in-line (cord) rotary switch for quick on and off.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
